text:
On 05/06/2010 18:20, Dominic Fandrey wrote:
> The gnome guys did their job. What about the rest?

That sounded rather unfriendly. I really just wanted to inquire,
what happens now.

I regularly check all my open PRs and I like to get them closed.

Regards

-- 
A: Because it fouls the order in which people normally read text.
Q: Why is top-posting such a bad thing?
A: Top-posting.
Q: What is the most annoying thing on usenet and in e-mail?
